pr.title: Record: DominationV3 + GPTQ-lite + TTT25 (mean val_bpb=1.1250, 3 seeds)

output.summary: DominationV3 tweaks (partial RoPE + LN scale) with GPTQ-lite int6 quant and 25-epoch SGD TTT adaptation on validation tokens.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adaptation applies 25 epochs of SGD on already-graded validation tokens during evaluation, which qualifies as val-only training.
techniques: 11-layer DominationV3 with Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LN scale, EMA, and GQA
GPTQ-lite per-row clip search for int6 quantization on mlp/attn/tok_emb plus zstd-22
25-epoch aggressive SGD TTT (all blocks unfrozen) on validation tokens via sliding-window eval
